# Kibbo

> Kibbo is an independent developer (Carlos López Tejeiro) building consumer-protection Chrome extensions and web apps. Products detect dark patterns, fake discounts, phishing, abusive contracts, and manipulative cookie consent. Source code is included with every purchase. No subscriptions.

## About
- About Kibbo and the developer behind it: https://www.getkibbo.com/about

## Products
- Web Guardian — Shopping Protection Suite (8 modules in one extension): https://www.getkibbo.com/#products
- AI Phishing Detector — Claude AI-powered SMS and email scam detection: https://www.getkibbo.com/#products
- Dark Patterns Detector — Fake urgency, trap checkboxes, confirmshaming: https://www.getkibbo.com/#products
- Legal Contract Analyzer — Abusive clauses and hard-to-cancel subscriptions: https://www.getkibbo.com/#products
- Price History Tracker — Verify discount authenticity before buying: https://www.getkibbo.com/#products
- Checkout Security Shield — Payment gateway verification and fraud blacklist: https://www.getkibbo.com/#products
- Cookie Consent Equalizer — Makes the reject button as easy as accept: https://www.getkibbo.com/#products

## Blog
- The 60% Trap: Why E-Commerce Giants Are Laundering Discounts: https://www.getkibbo.com/blog/the-60-percent-trap-fake-discounts-dynamic-pricing
- I built a phishing detector into Chrome using Claude AI: https://www.getkibbo.com/blog/phishing-detector-chrome-claude-ai
- I built a Chrome extension that catches every dark pattern on shopping sites: https://www.getkibbo.com/blog/dark-patterns-detector-javascript
